infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: CORE needs the microphone to hear your voice request.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: CORE transcribes your speech on-device to send the text to your assistant.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: CORE does not access your photo library. This string is required by Apple because a bundled SDK references the photo library API.

plugins.microphonePermission: CORE needs the microphone to hear your voice request.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: CORE transcribes your speech on-device to send the text to your assistant.
